name: Ground Beef Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and onions in a skillet.
2. Drain off excess fat.
3. Add seasonings to the meat mixture.
4. Stir in the soup and simmer on low heat, uncovered for 20 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Do not boil the mixture.
6. Just before serving, add sour cream and pour over the hot buttered noodles.
Serves 4
